overall_comment: All three figures are publication-ready: narrative.png and results.png cleanly communicate the multi-freq discovery with visible metrics and baseline comparison, and fft_analysis.png adds a compelling frequency-domain story; only minor polish remains.

issues.fix: Add y=1.02 to suptitle or bump figure height.

issues.issue: Figure annotates train MSE but not test MSE (the campaign metric).
Decomposition legend is dense inside plot area.
issues.fix: Move legend outside axes or shorten entries.

issues.issue: Method-comparison bars use inconsistent palette vs. other panels.
Residual panel's noise-band legend takes significant space.
issues.fix: Inline-label the band instead of using a legend entry.

issues.issue: Figure smaller than the other two; annotation font below 11pt spec.
issues.fix: Bump figure size and annotation fontsize.

issues.issue: Campaign test MSE not annotated on this figure.

resolution_note: ACCEPT, no MAJOR issues. Replica is an independent cross-validation that confirms the same basis and frequencies as primary. Skipping round-2 iteration — issues are stylistic and the metric is already ~20x under target. Primary orbit remains the reported winner.
